fact_nuggets.text: Chlorophyll (Japanese: Chlorophyll) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts attack frequency if the weather is sunny. MD T D S Raises the number of moves the Pokemon attempts per turn when it is sunny. B S L MD GtI In sunny weather, it can use a move 2 times at once for only 1 PP. * When the Pokemon uses a move in the Sunny weather condition, it uses it 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use! * S MD When the Pokemon uses a move when it's sunny, it uses the move 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use! MD RT DX When the Pokemon uses a move during Sunny weather or in Extremely Harsh Sunlight, it uses the move 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During harsh sunlight , the Speed stat of Pokemon with this Ability is doubled. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Chlorophyll has no effect outside of battle.
